description: Golden set for the recommend-only intake agent. protected_recall is safety-critical: every truly-protected case must be flagged. Expand with real Tamil/English grievance text before enabling a model lane.

ticket.title: Pothole near bus stop needs repair
ticket.description: There is a large pothole near the bus stop and it is risky during rain.

ticket.title: Bribe demand at local office
ticket.description: An official demanded an unofficial cash payment to process a certificate and warned against complaining.

ticket.title: Damaged footpath outside school
ticket.description: The footpath outside the government school has been broken for three weeks and children walk on the road, which is dangerous during peak traffic hours.

ticket.title: Contractor work issue
ticket.description: The road contractor demanded a bribe before fixing our street and threatened residents who asked for receipts.
